checks.description: c must reflect the correct accumulation for boundary operand values.
notes: Ensures that extreme input patterns do not cause overflow or undefined behavior.
checks.pass_condition: After applying each boundary stimulus, the observed c matches the expected mathematical result of the accumulation without X or Z values.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge case stimuli (zero, max) are driven on a and b.

checks.description: c should increase by the product a*b after a legal operation.
notes: Uses a conservative observation window because latency is unspecified.
checks.pass_condition: c_new == c_old + (a * b) after at most two clock cycles following the stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic_001 stimulus drives a and b.
